hook_text: The MOL inspector arrived at 9am. The HR file was ready at 9:02am. Here's how.
body:
Unannounced inspection. Muscat establishment. 94 employees.

The inspector asked for:
- Full employee register
- WPS records — last 6 months
- Leave balance summary
- Sanad registration certificates
- 3 specific employee contracts (selected on the spot)

Old process: 2-3 hours of frantic searching. Print runs. Possible gaps discovered under pressure.

New process with SmartPRO Hub: HR manager opened the inspection report module.

Employee register: generated in 18 seconds.
WPS records (6 months): exported as PDF in 34 seconds.
Leave balance summary: 12 seconds.
Sanad certificates: pulled from employee records in 9 seconds each.
3 contracts: located by employee name search, printed in 2 minutes.

Total time: under 3 minutes from request to handed over.

Inspector's note: "Best-organized establishment I've visited this quarter."

No fines. No follow-up required.

---

If an MOL inspector walked in tomorrow, how long would it take your team to pull those 5 documents?
cta: Comment "INSPECTION" for the full inspection readiness checklist.
rejected_reason: pre-PR#12 backlog purge — queue hygiene 2026-07-15 (regenerate via corrected pipeline)
